sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 106:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 106:1
items.html: Its vessel is the phase of Bina of the light of Hassadim. Its light is the self of the light of Hesed that was in the vessel of Bina. This is because the lights of Hesed and Gevura are only illuminations of GAR and VAK of Hochma that the light of Hesed received, but Tifferet is this light of Hassadim itself. The value of the Sefira is as the value of the Daat that copulates between Hochma and Bina, since it is the phase of the light of Hesed in the vessel of Bina, which is the light of Daat. (There)
